description_long: This is a rugged, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with a red, weathered exterior and a visible metal roll cage structure for occupant protection. The vehicle features four large, thick tires designed for off-road use, with exposed suspension components and a reinforced chassis. The front end has a prominent grille and visible shock absorbers, while the sides reveal a minimalistic interior with two bucket seats and a simple dashboard. The body panels are sparse, exposing much of the vehicle's internal framework and mechanical parts, emphasizing durability and functionality over aesthetics. The rear section is compact, with the roll cage extending above the passenger compartment for added safety. The overall design suggests a lightweight, high-performance vehicle built for navigating rough urban or off-road environments.
description: A red, open-frame all-terrain vehicle with a visible roll cage, large off-road tires, and exposed suspension, built for rugged environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the wide stance, large tires, and the roll cage structure above the cockpit.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the open cabin, bucket seats, and exposed frame and suspension components.
description_view_2: Front view with a clear look at the grille, shock absorbers, and the symmetrical tire arrangement.
description_view_3: Right side view displaying the open structure, interior seating, and mechanical details similar to the left side.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern designed for maximum grip on loose or uneven terrain, suitable for off-road and all-terrain conditions.
